infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CrewDesk uses the camera to capture profile photos and contract documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CrewDesk needs access to your photo library to upload profile photos and contract attachments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: CrewDesk saves documents and invoices to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: CrewDesk uses the microphone for voice messages.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: CrewDesk uses Face ID for secure authentication.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: CrewDesk accesses contacts to help you invite crew members.
